meta.title: NexSystems - Strategic websites for companies | Costa Rica
meta.description: We design corporate websites and digital experiences focused on commercial clarity, conversion, and professional positioning for companies in Costa Rica.

hero.eyebrow: Strategic web design for companies • Costa Rica
hero.h1_line1: We design websites that elevate your brand
hero.sub: We build clear, modern, professional websites that help your company look better and generate more inquiries.
hero.mini: Less noise. More clarity, trust, and conversion.
hero.trust_1: Messaging, structure, and design aligned with your commercial offer.
hero.trust_2: Clear desktop and mobile experience that builds stronger trust.
hero.trust_3: Forms, WhatsApp, and analytics ready to measure real opportunities.
hero.panel_sub: A well-made website organizes your offer and makes it easier for clients to contact you.
hero.panel_item_1_desc: Your offer is easy to understand, fast.
hero.panel_item_2_desc: A cleaner presentation that builds more trust.
hero.panel_item_3_desc: WhatsApp, forms, and tracking ready to work.

problem.title: Many companies do have a website. Very few have one that helps them sell better.
problem.subtitle: When a website does not explain the offer, does not build trust, or does not make contact easy, it becomes digital presence with little return.

cards.title: Unclear message
cards.desc: Visitors arrive and cannot understand in a few seconds why your company is the right choice.

cards.title: Design that lacks authority
cards.desc: A confusing or outdated interface reduces trust before the commercial conversation even starts.

cards.title: No clear contact path
cards.desc: There are no visible CTAs, the form does not help, or WhatsApp is buried inside the page.

cards.title: Weak mobile experience
cards.desc: Most visits happen on mobile, and that is where credibility gets lost the fastest.

cards.title: No learning loop
cards.desc: Without events or analytics, you cannot tell which content creates interest or where conversion gets blocked.

services.title: What we can build for your company
services.copy: Web solutions focused on professional presence and lead generation.

items.name: Express Audit
items.desc: Fast review of your current website with clear findings and actionable priorities.

items.name: Strategic Website
items.desc: Corporate website designed to build trust and open real business conversations.

items.name: Website + Full Analytics
items.desc: End-to-end implementation with visibility into which channel and page generate opportunities.

items.name: Scalable Business Web Platform
items.desc: Web platform prepared to grow with robust backend processes and cloud services.

showcase.title: A few recent projects
showcase.copy: A short sample of the kind of work we have already built.

why.title: Clearer execution, more direct collaboration, stronger business focus
why.copy: We are in launch stage as a brand, but our operating logic is serious: commercial structure, technical quality, and direct execution for companies that need to look better and sell with more order.

cards.title: Direct collaboration
cards.desc: You speak with the person defining structure, design, and implementation.

cards.title: Commercial thinking
cards.desc: We do not design just to look good. We design so your website helps you sell better.

cards.title: Modern foundation
cards.desc: We work with a current stack, strong performance, and architecture that is ready to grow.

cards.title: Long-term thinking
cards.desc: What we launch today leaves room for analytics, automation, and new sections tomorrow.

process.title: A clear process without unnecessary friction
process.subtitle: We work through a simple sequence so the website moves forward with direction, focus, and well-grounded decisions.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We understand the business, value proposition, objections, and the audience you actually want to reach.

steps.title: Architecture
steps.desc: We organize sections, copy, narrative, and CTAs so the experience has commercial intent.

steps.title: Production
steps.desc: We design and build a clean, fast interface that is mobile-ready from the start.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: We publish, configure tracking, and leave the base ready to iterate with real data.

lead.title: Request a quick review of your current website
lead.subtitle: We send a short review with clear opportunities to improve your website.
lead.name: Name
lead.success: Done. We received your request and will contact you soon.

ctaFinal.title: If your current website does not reflect the level of your company, we can rebuild it.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Clearer design, stronger presence, and easier contact.

footer.desc: We design web experiences that help companies look stronger, communicate clearly, and generate better opportunities.
